name: ai-lore
description: Plan, build, and ship work as parallel waves of atomic tasks. ai-lore is the master entry point; ai-lore-plan-waves decomposes a goal into dependency-ordered waves; ai-lore-build-waves orchestrates them as parallel sub-agents and gates each on its acceptance criteria; ai-lore-cleanup opens a PR or merges and tears down. Config-driven and codebase-agnostic.
